{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Legal and Compliance Manager",
  "description": "Apex Network is a Financial servicing firm, where anyone anywhere can easily and securely transact Bitcoin, which is the future of Money and a catalyst for creating and open financial system in Africa and the World.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Legal and Compliance Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment type: Full-time

The Mission


	Drive licensing and regulatory approvals across diverse jurisdictions.
	Bridge the gap between cutting-edge Web3 innovation and global compliance standards.
	Protect the company&#39;s legal positions while accelerating our speed-to-market.


Key Responsibilities


	As the Legal &amp; Compliance Manager, you will serve as the primary architect of our legal strategy and regulatory compliance framework.
	You will ensure that our Web3 products and cross-border operations remain compliant while supporting aggressive business growth.
	This role requires a rare blend of technical legal expertise and the agility to thrive in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment.
	Regulatory Navigation: Research and interpret evolving regulations for Fintech and Web3 in Ghana, Kenya, Cameroon, Poland, and the Americas.
	Licensing &amp; Permits: Lead the application process for necessary financial licenses (IMTO, PSP, VASP, EMI, etc.) in target jurisdictions.
	Compliance Framework: Design, implement, and manage robust AML/KYC/CFT policies and internal audit procedures.
	Contract Management: Draft, review, and negotiate complex commercial agreements, partnership contracts, and vendor terms.
	Stakeholder Liaison: Act as the primary point of contact for regulators, financial intelligence units, and external legal counsel.
	Risk Mitigation: Proactively identify legal risks in product roadmaps and provide actionable solutions to the Executive team.


Requirements
Required Qualifications &amp; Experience:


	Education: Bachelor of Laws (LLB) and relevant professional certification (CAMS or equivalent preferred).
	Experience: 10 years of experience in legal/compliance, with at least 3-5 years specifically within Fintech, Crypto, or Web3.
	Tech Literacy: Deep understanding of blockchain technology, smart contracts, and decentralized finance (DeFi).
	Regional Knowledge: Demonstrated experience managing compliance in at least two of our core regions (Africa, EU, or Americas).


The Candidate:


	Cognate Experience: You&rsquo;ve done this before in Fintech or Blockchain.
	Ownership Mentality: You don&#39;t wait for instructions; you deliver results.
	Global Mindset: You understand the nuances of the African, European, and American&nbsp;


Competencies &amp; Cultural Fit:


	Extreme Ownership: You take full responsibility for outcomes, not just tasks.
	High Performance: You excel in environments with high standards and rapid iteration.
	Strategic Thinking: You don&#39;t just say &quot;no&quot;; you provide a &quot;how-to&quot; that minimizes risk.
	Communication: Ability to distill complex legal jargon into clear business advice for non-legal stakeholders.


What We Offer


	The opportunity to shape the legal landscape of Web3 globally.
	A high-trust, high-autonomy work environment.
	Competitive compensation and performance-based incentives
	Private Health Insurance
	Pension Plan
	Paid Time Off
	Work From Home
	Training &amp; Development
	Performance Bonus.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-12",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-13",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

Legal and Compliance Manager Job at Apex Network




        
    

        
        Apex Network is a Financial servicing firm, where anyone anywhere can easily and securely transact Bitcoin, which is the future of Money and a catalyst for creating and open financial system in Africa and the World.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Legal and Compliance Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment type: Full-time

The Mission
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Drive licensing and regulatory approvals across diverse jurisdictions.
	Bridge the gap between cutting-edge Web3 innovation and global compliance standards.
	Protect the company's legal positions while accelerating our speed-to-market.


Key Responsibilities


	As the Legal & Compliance Manager, you will serve as the primary architect of our legal strategy and regulatory compliance framework.
	You will ensure that our Web3 products and cross-border operations remain compliant while supporting aggressive business growth.
	This role requires a rare blend of technical legal expertise and the agility to thrive in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment.
	Regulatory Navigation: Research and interpret evolving regulations for Fintech and Web3 in Ghana, Kenya, Cameroon, Poland, and the Americas.
	Licensing & Permits: Lead the application process for necessary financial licenses (IMTO, PSP, VASP, EMI, etc.) in target jurisdictions.
	Compliance Framework: Design, implement, and manage robust AML/KYC/CFT policies and internal audit procedures.
	Contract Management: Draft, review, and negotiate complex commercial agreements, partnership contracts, and vendor terms.
	Stakeholder Liaison: Act as the primary point of contact for regulators, financial intelligence units, and external legal counsel.
	Risk Mitigation: Proactively identify legal risks in product roadmaps and provide actionable solutions to the Executive team.


Requirements
Required Qualifications & Experience:


	Education: Bachelor of Laws (LLB) and relevant professional certification (CAMS or equivalent preferred).
	Experience: 10 years of experience in legal/compliance, with at least 3-5 years specifically within Fintech, Crypto, or Web3.
	Tech Literacy: Deep understanding of blockchain technology, smart contracts, and decentralized finance (DeFi).
	Regional Knowledge: Demonstrated experience managing compliance in at least two of our core regions (Africa, EU, or Americas).


The Candidate:


	Cognate Experience: You’ve done this before in Fintech or Blockchain.
	Ownership Mentality: You don't wait for instructions; you deliver results.
	Global Mindset: You understand the nuances of the African, European, and American 


Competencies & Cultural Fit:


	Extreme Ownership: You take full responsibility for outcomes, not just tasks.
	High Performance: You excel in environments with high standards and rapid iteration.
	Strategic Thinking: You don't just say "no"; you provide a "how-to" that minimizes risk.
	Communication: Ability to distill complex legal jargon into clear business advice for non-legal stakeholders.


What We Offer


	The opportunity to shape the legal landscape of Web3 globally.
	A high-trust, high-autonomy work environment.
	Competitive compensation and performance-based incentives
	Private Health Insurance
	Pension Plan
	Paid Time Off
	Work From Home
	Training & Development
	Performance Bonus.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "description": "Eko Maintenance Limited is a rapidly growing Facility Management Company that specializes in maintenance of high rise building facilities with office located in Victoria Island, Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Architect

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full Time (Onsite)

Job Description


	Control project from start to finish to ensure high quality, innovative and functional design.
	Work with clients to determine requirements for building projects.
	Develop initial estimates on structure costs, building time and special requirements.
	Conduct site visits and inspection to monitor construction progress and quality.
	Prepare detailed drawings showing both the appearance and interior structure of a building project. eg. Plumbing, Ventilating System, Electrical System, etc.
	Direct staff in the development of project drawings, studies and budgets.
	Ensure that all works are carried out to specific standards, building codes, guidelines and regulations.
	Comply with safety standards and local planning regulations.
	Follow architectural trends and advancements.


Requirements


	Candidate must possess a Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Architecture or any other related course.
	Must have 5-7 years of work experience as an architect with a specialty on high rise buildings.
	Sound knowledge of Microsoft Office applications especially Word, PowerPoint, and Excel.
	Proficient in the use of AUTOCAD and other computer aided programme.
	Candidate is expected to be familiar with operational HSE support for all activities.
	Strong analytical, communication and computer skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment2@ekomaintenance.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Architect Job at Eko Maintenance Limited




        
    

        
        Eko Maintenance Limited is a rapidly growing Facility Management Company that specializes in maintenance of high rise building facilities with office located in Victoria Island, Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Architect

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full Time (Onsite)

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Control project from start to finish to ensure high quality, innovative and functional design.
	Work with clients to determine requirements for building projects.
	Develop initial estimates on structure costs, building time and special requirements.
	Conduct site visits and inspection to monitor construction progress and quality.
	Prepare detailed drawings showing both the appearance and interior structure of a building project. eg. Plumbing, Ventilating System, Electrical System, etc.
	Direct staff in the development of project drawings, studies and budgets.
	Ensure that all works are carried out to specific standards, building codes, guidelines and regulations.
	Comply with safety standards and local planning regulations.
	Follow architectural trends and advancements.


Requirements


	Candidate must possess a Bachelor’s Degree in Architecture or any other related course.
	Must have 5-7 years of work experience as an architect with a specialty on high rise buildings.
	Sound knowledge of Microsoft Office applications especially Word, PowerPoint, and Excel.
	Proficient in the use of AUTOCAD and other computer aided programme.
	Candidate is expected to be familiar with operational HSE support for all activities.
	Strong analytical, communication and computer skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Vacancies at Delta State Polytechnic
content:
(adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    

The Delta State Polytechnic Ogwashi-Uku is one of the three polytechnics in Delta State, Nigeria, Located in Ogwashi-Uku Delta State, Nigeria. The polytechnic offers National Diplomas and Higher National Diplomas in Art and Design (Fashion Design and Clothing Technology, and General Art), Business (Accountancy, Business Administration, Human Resource Management, Marketing, Mass Communication, Office Technology Management and Production Operations Management), Engineering (Agriculture and Bio-environmental Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Foundry Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Metallurgical Engineering and Welding and Fabrication) and Applied Sciences (Computer Science, Mathematics and Statistics and Hospitality and Tourism Management).

Applications are invited from suitably qualified candidates to fill the following positions below:

1.) Bursar

Job Location: Ogwashi-Uku, Delta

Job Summary


	The Bursar is the Chief Financial Officer of the Polytechnic and a Principal Officer of the institution.
	He/She is responsible to the Rector for the day-to-day administration, coordination, and control of the financial affairs of the Polytechnic.


Duties & Responsibilities
The Bursar shall:


	Coordinate the preparation of the Polytechnic’s annual budget and financial forecasts.
	Manage and control the finances of the institution in line with extant financial regulations and policies.
	Advise the Rector, Management, and Governing Council on all financial matters.
	Ensure proper maintenance of accounting records and timely preparation of financial statements.
	Supervise revenue generation, expenditure control, and investment activities.
	Ensure compliance with audit requirements and public financial management standards.
	Maintain effective financial planning, monitoring, and reporting systems.
	Support institutional financial sustainability through prudent resource management.


Qualifications & Experience
Candidates must:


	Possess a good Honours Degree (minimum of Second Class Lower Division) in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or a related discipline from a recognized institution, or a good Higher National Diploma (HND) in a relevant discipline with a minimum of Lower Credit.
	Hold a recognized professional accounting qualification such as ICAN, ANAN, ACCA, or equivalent.
	Have a minimum of eighteen (18) years post-qualification cognate experience, preferably within a tertiary institution.
	Have attained the rank of Chief Accountant or its equivalent on CONTEDISS 15.
	Be proficient in ICT and modern financial management systems.


Requirements
Applicants must:


	Be persons of proven integrity with demonstrable leadership and managerial qualities.
	Possess a thorough understanding of financial administration within the Polytechnic system.
	Not be more than fifty-nine (59) years of age at the time of assumption of duty.
	Demonstrate strong analytical, organizational, and decision-making skills.
	Be capable of working effectively within regulatory and institutional frameworks.


Key Competencies:


	Strong financial management and budgeting expertise.
	Excellent knowledge of public sector accounting standards and financial regulations.
	High level of integrity, accountability, and professionalism.
	Strong leadership and team management capabilities.
	Proficiency in financial reporting and modern accounting software.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.


Terms of Appointment & Conditions of Service


	The appointment is for a single tenure of five (5) years only.
	Salary and conditions of service shall be as approved for Polytechnics in Nigeria.


Application Closing Date: 23rd June, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested candidates should submit twenty (20) copies of their applications with detailed Curriculum Vitae and photocopies of credentials, including:


	Full Name (Surame underlined)
	Date and Place of Birth
	Natonality and State of Ongin
	Local Government Area
	Educational Institutions attended with dates
	Academic and Professional Qualifications with dates
	Work experience and positions held
	Present Employment, Status, and Salary
	Names and addresses of three (3) referees.
	Referees should forward confidential reports directly to the Ag. Registrar.


Applications must be addressed and submitted in sealed envelopes marked "Application for the Post of Bursar" to:
The Acting Registrar,
Delta State Polytechnic,
PMB 1030, Ogwashi-Uku,
Delta State, Nigeria.

 

2.) Polytechnic Librarian

Job Location: Ogwashi-Uku, Delta

Job Summary


	The Polytechnic Librarian is a Principal Officer and Head of the Polytechnic Library, responsible to the Rector for the overall administration, development, and coordination of library and information services.


Qualifications & Experience
Candidates must:


	Possess a good Honours Degree in Library Science or Library and Information Science (minimum of Second Class Lower Division).
	Hold a Master’s Degree in Library and Information Science; a Ph.D. will be an added advantage.
	Be registered with the Librarians’ Registration Council of Nigeria (LRCN).
	Have at least fifteen (15) years of cognate experience in tertiary institutions, with substantial experience in a Polytechnic or comparable TVET institution.
	Have served as Chief Librarian for not less than five (5) years.
	Be ICT compliant with demonstrable competence in digital library systems.
	Show evidence of scholarly publications in reputable journals.


Key Competencies:


	Strong leadership and administrative capabilities.
	Excellent knowledge of modern library systems and information management practices.
	Proficiency in digital library technologies and ICT applications.
	Strong research, academic writing, and publication record.
	Effective communication and interpersonal skills.
	High level of integrity, professionalism, and organizational ability.
	Ability to drive innovation and continuous improvement in library services.


Terms of Appointment


	The appointment is for a single tenure of five (5) years.
	Salary and conditions of service shall be as applicable to Principal Officers in Nigerian Polytechnics.


Application Closing Date: 23rd June, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested candidates should submit twenty (20) copies of their applications with detailed Curriculum Vitae and photocopies of credentials, Including:


	Full Name (Surname underlined)
	Date and Place of Birth.
	Nationality, State and LGA of Origin.
	Permanent Home Address.
	Current Contact Address (including phone number and email).
	Marital Status.
	Educational Institutions attended (with dates)
	Academic and Professional Qualifications (with dates).
	Work Experience.
	List of Publications.
	Present Employment, Status, and Salary
	Names and addresses of three (3)referees
	Referees should forward confidential reports directly to the Ag. Registrar.


Applications must be addressed and submitted in sealed envelopes marked "Application for the Post of Polytechnic Librarian" to:
The Acting Registrar,
Delta State Polytechnic,
PMB 1030, Ogwashi-Uku,
Delta State, Nigeria.

 

3.) Registrar

Job Location: Ogwashi-Uku, Delta

Job Summary


	The Registrar is a Principal Officer and the Chief Administrative Officer of the Polytechnic, responsible to the Rector for the day-to-day administration of the institution.


Duties & Responsibilities
The Registrar shall:


	Serve as the Head of the Registry and custodian of Polytechnic records and documents.
	Act as Secretary to the Governing Council, Academic Board, Management, and other statutory committees.
	Perform such other duties as may be assigned by the Rector or Governing Council.


Qualifications & Experience
Candidates must possess:


	A Bachelor’s Degree (minimum of Second Class Lower) in Social Sciences, Education, Arts, Humanities, or related fields with at least eighteen (18) years post-qualification cognate experience; Or
	A Master’s Degree with at least fifteen (15) years of cognate experience; Or
	A Ph.D. with at least twelve (12) years cognate experience.


Additionally, candidates must have:


	At least ten (10) years of experience in a Polytechnic or similar TVET institution.
	Membership of a recognized relevant professional body.
	Attained the rank of Senior Deputy Registrar on CONTEDISS 15 or equivalent.
	Sound knowledge of Public Service Rules and the Polytechnic system.
	Proficiency in ICT and administrative systems.


Personal Qualities:
Applicants must:


	Not be more than fifty-nine (59) years old at the time of assumption of duty.
	Be physically and mentally fit, with evidence from a Government hospital.
	Be of proven integrity, impeccable character, and free from financial embarrassment.
	Demonstrate strong administrative leadership, initiative, and interpersonal skills.
	Be non-partisan and capable of upholding institutional neutrality.


Terms of Appointment


	The appointment is for a single tenure of five (5) years.
	Salary and conditions of service shall be as approved for Principal Officers of State Polytechnics.


Application Closing Date: 23rd June, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested candidates should submit twenty (20) copies of their applications with detailed Curriculum Vitae and photocopies of credentials, including:


	Full Name (Surname first)
	Date and Place of Birth.
	State of Origin/LGA and Nationality.
	Marital Status.
	Contact Address, Phone Number, and Email.
	Educational Qualifications (with dates)
	Professional Memberships.
	Work Experience and positions held
	Present Employment (status and duties).
	Names and addresses of three (3) referees.
	Referees should forward confidential reports directly to the Ag. Registrar.


Applications must be addressed and submitted in sealed envelopes marked "Application for the Post of Registrar" to:
The Acting Registrar,
Delta State Polytechnic,
PMB 1030, Ogwashi-Uku,
Delta State, Nigeria.

Note


	Referees' reports must reach the Acting Registrar before the closing date.
	Candidates must present originals of credentials at interview
	Only shortlisted candidates will be invited.


 

4.) Rector

Job Location: Ogwashi-Uku, Delta

The Position


	By virtue of the Delta State Polytechnic, Ogwashi-Uku Law (2002), the Rector is a Principal Officer of the Polytechnic and the Chief Academic and Executive Officer.
	The Rector shall be responsible for the day-to-day administration of the institution and shall serve as the Chairman of the Academic Board, Congregation, and Convocation.


The Candidate
The ideal candidate must possess a sound educational background, high academic standing, and a proven track record of achievement in academia. Specifically, the candidate must:


	Be a distinguished scholar not below the rank of Chief Lecturer in a Polytechnic or Senior Lecturer in a University at the
	time of application, with expertise in at least one discipline/course offered by the Polytechnic;
	Command the respect of national and international academic communities; Present a clear and feasible vision for the development of the Polytechnic.
	Demonstrate the ability to attract external funding and generate internal revenue; Be in excellent physical and mental health
	Possess strong academic and administrative leadership skills;
	Demonstrate integrity, transparency, accountability, and resourcefulness;
	Be a person of sound character with excellent interpersonal and leadership qualities.
	The candidate must not be above sixty (60) years of age at the time of appointment.


Qualifications and Experience
Interested candidates must possess:


	A Doctorate Degree in any discipline/ course/area of programmes offered by the Polytechnic;
	At least fifteen (15) years of professional and administrative experience;
	Cognate experience as a Chief Lecturer in a Polytechnic, Senior Lecturer in a University, or equivalent institution at the time of application;
	Demonstrable capacity for academic and administrative leadership as well as the ability to effectively discharge the duties and responsibilities of the office of the Rector;
	Evidence of scholarly publications in reputable journals and presentations at conferences, seminars, and workshops; and Membership of relevant professional bodies.
	Candidates must also demonstrate the ability to command the respect and loyalty of staff and students.


Terms and Conditions of Service


	The Rector shall hold office for a single term of five (5) years on such terms and conditions as may be specified in the letter of appointment and in accordance with the Conditions of Service of the Polytechnic, as approved by the Governing Council and the Delta State Government.


Application Closing Date: 21st May, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send twenty-five (25) copies of their Curriculum Vitae, duly signed and dated, and must be presented in the following order:


	Full Name (Surname first and in capital letters)
	Place and Date of Birth
	State of Origin and Nationality
	Marital Status (including number and ages of children)
	Religion
	Current Postal Address (with phone number and email address)
	Permanent Address
	Institutions Attended (with dates) Educational Qualifications (with dates)
	Professional Qualifications (with dates) Membership of Professional Bodies Distinctions and Awards (with dates)
	Work Experience (including full details of previous and present positions)
	Academic and Related Services to the Nation and Tertiary Education System Conferences, Workshops, and Courses Attended (with dates)
	Publications (Theses, Books, Monographs, and Articles)
	Present Employment Status, Salary, and Employer
	Attended (with dates)
	Publications (Theses, Books, Monographs, and Articles)
	Present Employment Status, Salary, and Employer
	Extracurricular
	Activities
	Medical Fitness Report (from a Government Hospital)
	Names and Addresses of Three (3) Referees (one of whom must be in the candidate's field of study)
	Candidates must submit a Vision and Mission Statement for the Polytechnic (not exceeding 1,000 words).


All applications, supporting documents, and referees’ reports must be submitted by hand under confidential cover, or through courier delivery, and should be marked "Post of the Rector" to:
The Chairman, Governing Council,
c / o Office of the Registrar,
Delta State Polytechnic,
Ogwashi-Uku,
Delta State,
Nigeria.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be

Job Position: Tax Associate

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos

Job Description


	Prepare and file tax returns (CIT, VAT, WHT, PIT) in compliance with statutory requirements; support audits with the Federal Inland Revenue Service and State tax authorities.
	Support tax advisory engagements, including transaction structuring, regulatory compliance, and tax research.
	Manage client interactions, analyze financial data, and prepare reports and deliverables.
	Monitor tax law changes (including the Companies Income Tax Act, Personal Income Tax Act, and Value Added Tax Act) and assess client impact.
	Identify tax risks, ensure compliance, and contribute to internal process improvements and business development initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or a related field with 0 - 2 years of relevant audit or accounting experience is a plus.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and audit/accounting software.
	Ability to use Caseware and Sage is a MUST.
	Must be a Chartered Accountant.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: updealcareers@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Tax Associate Job at Updeal Resources




        
    

        
        Updeal Resources is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Tax Associate

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Prepare and file tax returns (CIT, VAT, WHT, PIT) in compliance with statutory requirements; support audits with the Federal Inland Revenue Service and State tax authorities.
	Support tax advisory engagements, including transaction structuring, regulatory compliance, and tax research.
	Manage client interactions, analyze financial data, and prepare reports and deliverables.
	Monitor tax law changes (including the Companies Income Tax Act, Personal Income Tax Act, and Value Added Tax Act) and assess client impact.
	Identify tax risks, ensure compliance, and contribute to internal process improvements and business development initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or a related field with 0 - 2 years of relevant audit or accounting experience is a plus.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and audit/accounting software.
	Ability to use Caseware and Sage is a MUST.
	Must be a Chartered Accountant.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Job Openings at INAB Realty Limited
content:
INAB Realty Limited is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the following positions below:

1.) Sales Executive

Job Location: Lagos

Responsibilities


	Drive property sales by engaging clients, closing deals, sourcing properties, acquiring new customers, and supporting marketing efforts while reporting to the Sales Manager.


Method of Application 

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



2.) Videographer / Photographer & Editor

Job Location: Lagos

Responsibilities


	Create engaging visual content showcasing properties, developments, projects, and sales campaigns to strengthen brand engagement and client trust.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

3.) Project Manager / Coordinator

Job Location: Lagos

Responsibilities


	Oversee real estate development and construction projects by managing timelines, teams, contractors, and resources to ensure successful project and campaign execution.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
